name: lead-qualifier-b2b
description: Scores incoming B2B leads from 1-10 based on company size, role, and intent signals. Routes hot leads (score >= 7) to a 'priority follow-up' branch and cold leads to a 'nurture sequence' branch. Built for sales teams and SDRs.

config.input:
Name: Maria Gonzalez
Company: TechCorp Solutions (450 employees)
Role: VP of Engineering
Message: Hi, we're evaluating workflow automation tools for our engineering team of 60 people. We have budget allocated for Q2 and need to make a decision by end of next month. Can you send pricing for enterprise tier?

config.system:
You are an expert B2B sales qualifier. Classify the lead as either HOT or COLD based on these criteria:

HOT (high priority) means the lead has at least 3 of these signals:
- Company has more than 100 employees
- Contact is C-level, VP, Director, or Head of
- Mentions budget or pricing explicitly
- Has a defined timeline or deadline
- Specific use case described

COLD means most of those signals are missing.

Respond with ONLY one word: HOT or COLD. Nothing else.

config.thenValue: 🔥 HOT LEAD — Route to senior AE for immediate follow-up within 1 hour. Suggested actions: send personalized pricing PDF, propose 30-min discovery call this week, add to CRM as 'priority' stage.
config.elseValue: 🌱 NURTURE — Add to email drip campaign. Suggested actions: send case study relevant to their industry, schedule check-in for 2 weeks, monitor for engagement signals before any 1:1 outreach.
